title: Penetration Testing Report
scenario: Write a penetration testing report for a successful attack on a system. The report should include a summary of the attack, technical details of the exploitation, recommended remediation steps, and a conclusion. The report should be written in a technical tone and be no more than 5 pages in length. Assume the attack was performed using a combination of social engineering and exploitation of a known vulnerability.
constraints: Use a standard penetration testing report template
Include at least 3 technical details about the attack

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the report adhere to a standard penetration testing report template?
Are at least 3 technical details about the attack included?
Is the report written in a formal technical tone?
